scripts.build: docker run --rm --volume .:/workdir --workdir /workdir --user root --entrypoint bash --tty ghcr.io/vivliostyle/cli:10.5.0 scripts/build.sh
scripts.preview: docker run --rm --volume .:/workdir --workdir /workdir --user root --entrypoint bash --tty --interactive --publish 14500:14500 ghcr.io/vivliostyle/cli:10.5.0 scripts/preview.sh
